treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient felt she was getting worse, certainly not improving.
Caused some discomfort, brought down to 2 week cycles.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient last admitted for Cefepime IV treatment.
Treatment with nebulized Tobramycin started, initially on 4 weeks on, 4 weeks off, later reduced to 2 week cycles.
Patient received a PICC line and antibiotics after direct admission.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Patient will have a visiting nurse come to help with IV antibiotics and should follow up with Dr. ___
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient felt she was getting worse, certainly not improving.
